name: NaviTrust

methods.name: register_shipment
methods.desc: Register a new shipment. Oracle only. Cannot re-register.

methods.name: fund_shipment
methods.desc: Buyer locks ALGO into escrow. Minimum 0.1 ALGO.

methods.name: record_verdict
methods.desc: Oracle writes 4-agent jury verdict on-chain. Immutable.

methods.name: settle_shipment
methods.desc:
Atomic settlement:
1. Pay supplier locked ALGO   2. Mint ARC-69 settlement certificate NFT (PRAMANIK-CERT)   3. Update supplier reputation Returns certificate ASA ID.

methods.name: pause_oracle
methods.desc: Pause oracle write paths that check is_paused. Oracle only.

methods.name: get_required_mbr
methods.desc:
Minimum balance required to register one shipment (~9 boxes).
Conservative estimate: 0.5 ALGO = 500_000 microALGO.

desc:
Pramanik (प्रमाणिक) — Supply Chain Dispute Oracle on Algorand.

    "Pramanik" means verified and authentic in Hindi.
    Buyer locks ALGO. 4-Agent AI jury examines evidence.
    Verdict is immutable on-chain. Settlement is atomic.

    Box prefix scheme (all keys are prefix + shipment_id bytes):
      st_ = status          (String: In_Transit / Disputed / Settled)
      sp_ = supplier        (Account)
      by_ = buyer           (Account)
      fn_ = funds           (UInt64 microALGO)
      rs_ = risk_score      (UInt64 0-100)
      vd_ = verdict_json    (Bytes)
      rt_ = route           (Bytes)
      ce_ = certificate ASA (UInt64)
      rp_ = supplier rep    (UInt64, key = supplier)

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Cannot record verdict on settled shipment
Cannot settle disputed shipment directly — record cleared verdict first
No verdict recorded — run jury first
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
